text.title: IaC Testing Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `IaC Testing Patterns` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: pick-layers
step.action: Choose unit / component / integration coverage; document layer responsibilities.

step.name: policy-gates
step.action: Translate org policies into OPA / Sentinel / Checkov rules.

step.name: sandbox-provision
step.action: Provision an isolated sandbox project with budget alerts + janitor; restrict integration creds to it.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add unit + component + integration + policy stages; gate merge on all green.
